title: Mirror editor ergonomics in localhost playground
description: The root localhost playground now matches the static demo editor ergonomics: top Render action, line-number gutter, and draggable editor width.
decision_notes: The root playground is the default localhost surface, so demo-only editor improvements caused inconsistent editing behavior.
The implementation mirrors the demo page structure instead of adding a separate component abstraction, keeping the interrupt small.
verification: Browser DOM check on http://127.0.0.1:4174/: hasLineNumbers=true, hasResizeHandle=true, renderParentClass=panel-top
